svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="473" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_SequenceDiagram_READ

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceParticipantBorderColor #1E88E5
skinparam sequenceParticipantBackgroundColor #E3F2FD
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #1E88E5
skinparam noteBorderColor #FFA000
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFF8E1

title READ Scenario: Get Movie with Shows

actor Client as C
participant \"MovieController\" as MC
participant \"MovieService\" as MS
participant \"MovieRepository\" as MR
participant \"ShowRepository\" as SR
participant \"ShowSeatRepository\" as SSR
participant \"EntityMapper\" as EM
database \"Database\" as DB

C -> MC : GET /api/v1/movies/{id}/shows\n?city=Bangalore&date=2026-03-29
activate MC

MC -> MS : getMovieWithShows(movieId, city, date)
activate MS

MS -> MR : findById(movieId)
activate MR
MR -> DB : SELECT * FROM movies WHERE id = ?
DB --> MR : Movie
MR --> MS : Movie
deactivate MR

MS -> SR : findShowsByMovieCityAndDate(movieId, city, date)
activate SR
SR -> DB : SELECT * FROM shows s\nJOIN screens sc ON s.screen_id = sc.id\nJOIN theaters t ON sc.theater_id = t.id\nWHERE s.movie_id = ? AND t.city = ? AND s.show_date = ?
DB --> SR : List<Show>
SR --> MS : List<Show>
deactivate SR

note right of MS : Group shows by theater

loop For each show
 MS -> SSR : countAvailableSeatsForShow(showId)
 activate SSR
 SSR -> DB : SELECT COUNT(*) FROM show_seats\nWHERE show_id = ? AND status = 'AVAILABLE'
 DB --> SSR : count
 SSR --> MS : availableSeats
 deactivate SSR
end

MS -> EM : toMovieDTO(movie)
activate EM
EM --> MS : MovieDTO
deactivate EM

MS -> EM : toTheaterDTO(), toShowDTO()
activate EM
EM --> MS : TheaterDTO, ShowDTO
deactivate EM

MS --> MC : MovieSearchResponseDTO
deactivate MS

MC --> C : 200 OK\n{\n \"movie\": {...},\n \"theaterShows\": [\n {\"theater\": {...}, \"shows\": [...]}\n ]\n}
deactivate MC

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-8"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="990" width="1407" x="120" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
